{
  "type": "VIDEO",
  "videoUrl": "https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/abcdefghijk",
  "videoTitle": "Key Concepts in Cybersecurity Walkthrough",
  "content": "In this video, we will explore fundamental concepts in cybersecurity essential for beginners.",
  "videoWebUrl": "https://www.example.com/key-concepts-cybersecurity",
  "content": [
    "Understand the definition of key terms:",
    "- Threat: A potential cause of an unwanted incident in cybersecurity.",
    "- Vulnerability: A weakness in a system that can be exploited.",
    "- Risk: The potential for loss or damage when a threat exploits a vulnerability.",
    "Learn how these concepts interconnect and affect cybersecurity practices."
  ]
}
